I am so frustrated with your service! I ordered a product two weeks ago, and while I appreciate the holiday decorations in your store, the package has still not arrived. I've heard great things about your products but now I'm seriously reconsidering. My friend told me to check online for updates, but all I find are old posts from last year about delivery delays. Can someone please explain why this is taking so long? It’s just really disappointing, and I expected much better from a company as reputed as yours! Also, why do I keep receiving emails about promotions when I’m dealing with this issue?
